name: morph-mini-player
description: A compact music player that morphs into a full player: the album art is a single persistent element that resizes from a 48px thumbnail into a full-width hero — a real shared-element move, not a crossfade — while the mini-bar text swaps out and the Card springs in around it. The title + artist, a labelled progressbar with elapsed/total times, prev / play-pause / next transport controls and a shuffle/repeat row stagger in on open and reverse-stagger out on close. Built on framer-motion via block-motion, so the whole morph collapses to a plain crossfade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: The collapsed mini bar is a single labelled toggle ("Open player: … by …" + aria-expanded); the full player carries a labelled minimize control, so both states are keyboard- and screen-reader-reachable
The track title renders as plain text (not a heading) so it never forces a heading level onto the host page; the transport buttons are grouped and individually labelled (Previous / Play-Pause / Next)
The scrubber is a role=progressbar with aria-valuenow + a valuetext ("1:12 of 3:45"); the album art, its note glyph and the play knob are decorative and aria-hidden
The play/pause control reflects state through its aria-label; the resize/stagger morph respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider, collapsing to a plain crossfade

intents: a compact music player that expands into a full now-playing screen
a shared-element morph from a mini player bar to a full player
an animated media player built on ibirdui
